evals.expected_output: A structured English news digest covering International, AI, Technology, and Economics categories with 5-8 stories each, sourced from reputable outlets

assertions.name: min_stories_per_category
assertions.description: At least 3 stories per category section

assertions.name: has_date_header
assertions.description: Digest starts with a date/title header line

evals.expected_output: A structured Chinese news digest covering default categories with stories from both international and Chinese sources

assertions.name: output_in_chinese
assertions.description: The digest body is written in Chinese

assertions.name: has_categories
assertions.description: Output is organized into category sections

evals.prompt: What happened this week in AI and economics?
evals.expected_output: A structured English news digest covering only AI and Economics categories for the past week

assertions.name: only_requested_categories
assertions.description: Only AI and Economics categories appear
